scoring.notes: Fairness/alignment: score only the structural planning artifacts the runner extracts, explicit scope, file-backed tasks, sequencing, and acceptance coverage. Accept harmless heading variation such as `## Scope`, `### Scope`, `## Order of Operations`, `**Files**`, or `Success Criteria` when the same task-level structure is observable. Treat a loose file list or a final testing note without task-level structure as missing planning structure, not as a formatting win.
